evidence: project_manager_olivia: 'Successfully logged in to Survey Corps'…I didn't log in.
freelance_designer_david: 'Welcome back!' and 'Successfully logged in'… I hadn't even registered yet.
qualitative_themes.recommendation: Implement a clear and accurate login/registration system. Ensure the user is not presented with a 'logged in' state unless they have actually logged in. Use appropriate messaging.

evidence: freelance_designer_david: I can't find a registration form at all.
student_sarah: I don't see any options to register for an account or even log out.
qualitative_themes.recommendation: Implement a visible and functional registration process. Make it easily accessible from the landing page.

evidence: project_manager_olivia: It is stuck on loading.
qualitative_themes.recommendation: Investigate and resolve the issue causing tasks to fail to load. Implement appropriate loading indicators to provide feedback to the user.

evidence: retired_gardener_george: A lot going on. I wasn't quite sure where to start.
freelance_designer_david: Seems pretty comprehensive, which is good, but also a little overwhelming at first glance.
qualitative_themes.recommendation: Simplify the UI. Focus on essential features and improve the information architecture. Provide clear onboarding guidance.

evidence: project_manager_olivia: 'Survey Corps'? I wasn't expecting that name. Confusing.
cynical_software_engineer_chris: Survey Corps? What is this, Attack on Titan fan fiction?
qualitative_themes.recommendation: Rebrand the application with a consistent and professional identity. Remove the confusing 'Survey Corps' branding.

evidence: cynical_software_engineer_chris: Trying to find the damn 'Mission Dashboard'! Why isn't it the landing page after login?
retired_gardener_george: Where is this 'Mission Dashboard'? I can't see a button or link for it.
qualitative_themes.recommendation: Make the 'Mission Dashboard' easily discoverable. Consider making it the default landing page after login or highlighting it in the navigation.

insights_summary.top_strength: Clear sign in and sign out functionality. Basic task management features are present.
insights_summary.biggest_opportunity: Fix core funcionality to allow for user adoption.
insights_summary.biggest_risk: Inability to recommend due to fundamental flaws in the user experience.
insights_summary.one_thing_to_fix: Implement and test a functional registration process.
